prose: **Pyridine HOMO–LUMO gap** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (density fit) was used in PySCF in the **gas phase**. The calculation employed neutral charge (0) and singlet multiplicity (1). The geometry was taken directly from the provided pyridine.xyz file; this was **NOT re-optimized in this task** but used as-is. The SCF cycle converged within 10 steps. A Koopmans-style frontier orbitals analysis was performed, revealing **HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV**, and the HOMO–LUMO gap was reported as approximately **6.1398 eV** in electronic energy terms. Calculation can be re-run using this command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent none /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8sgtlbja/live.json`. Analysis verified and integrity checks passed as trustworthy.
